channel.title: Comments for page ""Smile! You Are Being Watched!""
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread ""Smile! You Are Being Watched!""

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Shit. Our dissociation is mostly under control these days. Mostly. The worst of it is over a decade ago. Closer to two. But that still hit me pretty hard.

I'm not mad or anything, there was enough in-story warning. I'm just… Letting it out.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I love this! I do like it when the "plot" of SCP, GAW, etc. advances

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
There was such a wonderful response to my first SCP, I didn't want to delay in fleshing out steakshift's circumstances with a Tale. "Smile! You Are Being Watched!" was written in the interests of showing where Wren Masterson is coming from - not just as a political actor, or as a troll dunking on the Foundation, but as a damaged human being who is trying (with mixed success) to do right.

Unfortunately, on top of this opsec disaster, Masterson has a lot of old problems that still need solving. (Keep your eyes peeled for the sequels, dear readers.)

Shoutout to Kybard for giving the final draft a once-over, and to kinchtheknifeblade for being open to hearing some of these ideas. Much appreciated, both of you! (Oh, and shoutout to NatVoltaic, creator of Site-201!)
